title: 2021 Aman-season drought — Barind Tract / Rajshahi
summary: Northwest Bangladesh's Barind Tract had its peak extreme-drought year in 2021, with monsoon rainfall about 18% below normal in Rajshahi, stressing rainfed Aman rice at its reproductive stage. This POC scores that stress from a rainfall-deficit + NDVI-germination index.

sources.label: Islam et al. 2024 — Barind Tract drought (NDVI/VHI)
The Business Standard 2021 — Drought puts Aman rice at risk
